errors.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized. Please login
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later
errors.accessDenied: Access denied. You don't have permission to view this content.
errors.navigationError: This page didn't load correctly. Go back or try again.

invites.alreadySent: Invite already sent to this user
invites.notAuthorizedToAccept: Not authorized to accept this invite
invites.notAuthorizedToDecline: Not authorized to decline this invite
invites.cannotSendAfterGameStarted: Invites cannot be sent or revived after the game has started
invites.notAuthorizedToAcceptQueue: You are not authorized to accept this player from the queue
invites.onlyParticipantsCanView: Only participants can view game invites
invites.onlySenderCanCancel: Only the sender can cancel this invite

userTeams.onlyOwner: Only the team owner can do this
userTeams.onlyOwnerInvites: Only the team owner can invite
userTeams.alreadyMember: This player is already on the team
userTeams.nameTooShort: Team name must be at least 3 characters

games.cannotJoinArchivedOrFinished: Cannot join archived or finished game
games.directJoinNotAllowed: Direct join is not allowed for this game
games.cannotDeleteHasChildren: Cannot delete a game that has child games (e.g. tournament with rounds). Delete or remove child games first.

league.playerIdsRequired: At least one player is required
league.onlyLeagueRound: Only league round games can have participants assigned directly
league.onlySeasonOwnerAdmin: Only league season owner or admin can assign participants
league.mustBeSeasonParticipants: All players must be participants of this league season
league.tooManyPlayers: Too many players for this game

bugs.updateForbidden: Only the bug creator or an admin can update this bug
bugs.statusOrTypeRequired: Valid status or bugType is required

errors.syncPending: Please wait for sync to complete
errors.syncRequired: Please sync to server before finishing

booking.slotNoLongerAvailable: This slot is no longer available.
booking.sessionExpired: Your club booking sign-in expired. Please sign in again.
booking.courtNotConfigured: Online booking is not set up for this court.
booking.clubNotConfigured: This club is not set up for online booking.
booking.connectionNotFound: No club booking account is connected.
booking.configNotFound: Club booking settings were not found.
booking.externalProviderMustBeBooktime: Invalid booking provider for linked reservations.
booking.externalProviderUnsupported: This booking provider is not supported.
booking.padelooClubIdRequired: Padeloo club ID is required in integration config.
booking.klikterenVenueIdRequired: Klikteren venue ID is required in integration config.
booking.cannotClearBookedCourtWithLinks: Remove linked reservations before clearing the booked court flag.
booking.patchRequiresBookingId: Specify at least one reservation to link or unlink.
booking.updateLinksForbidden: Only owners and admins can manage linked reservations.
booking.alreadyLinked: This reservation is already linked to the game.
booking.updateSnapshotsForbidden: Only owners and admins can update reservation details.
booking.snapshotsRequired: At least one reservation snapshot is required.
booking.bookingNotLinked: Reservation {{externalBookingId}} is not linked to this game.
booking.legacyExternalBookingIdRejected: Legacy booking field removed. Use externalBookingIds and PATCH /games/:id/bookings.
booking.companyIdRequired: Club booking integration requires a company ID.
booking.integrationTypeMustBeOnlineBooking: Club integration must be online booking.
booking.rollbackFailed: Could not confirm the reservation was cancelled.

fullRoundRobin.requiresFixedTeams: This action is only available for fixed-team seasons.
fullRoundRobin.noGroups: Create groups before generating a full schedule.
fullRoundRobin.invalidTeamParticipants: Every participant in each group must be a team with exactly two players.
fullRoundRobin.groupsMustHaveSameTeamCount: All groups must have the same number of teams.
fullRoundRobin.tooFewTeams: At least two teams are required per group.
fullRoundRobin.regularRoundsAlreadyExist: Regular season rounds already exist. Delete them in the schedule before generating a full round-robin.

recreate.noRegularRounds: Create a regular season schedule before recreating it.
recreate.duplicateProtectedMatchup: Two scheduled or completed matches share the same teams. Resolve them manually first.
recreate.cannotPlaceProtectedGame: Could not place a scheduled match into the new round structure.
recreate.invalidProtectedGame: A match could not be identified for the recreate. Resolve league games manually first.
recreate.unknownTeamRoster: Current team rosters do not match an existing match.
recreate.pairingNotInSchedule: Internal error while rebuilding the schedule.
